# Auth Module — LLM Context

> Complete context for the authentication and authorization system.

## Overview

Passwordless authentication via magic links with optional TOTP 2FA. Dual cookie auth schemes for tenant users and super admins. RBAC with plan-gated feature flags.

## File Structure

```
src/Modules/Auth/
├── AuthModule.cs
├── Controllers/
│   ├── ProfileController.cs
│   ├── SessionController.cs
│   ├── SuperAdminAuthController.cs
│   ├── SuperAdminTwoFactorController.cs
│   ├── TenantAuthController.cs
│   └── TwoFactorController.cs
├── Data/
├── Entities/
│   ├── AppUser.cs, AppRole.cs
│   ├── MagicLinkToken.cs
│   ├── Permission.cs, RolePermission.cs
│   └── UserSession.cs
├── Filters/
├── Services/
│   ├── CurrentUser.cs
│   ├── EmailVerificationService.cs
│   ├── MagicLinkCleanupService.cs
│   ├── MagicLinkService.cs
│   ├── SuperAdminTwoFactorService.cs
│   └── TwoFactorService.cs
├── TagHelpers/
└── Views/
```

## Auth Schemes

| Scheme | Cookie Name | Lifetime | Login Path |
|--------|------------|----------|------------|
| `TenantAuth` | `.Tenant.Auth` | 12 hours (sliding) | `/{slug}/login` |
| `SuperAdminAuth` | `.SuperAdmin.Auth` | 24 hours (sliding) | `/super-admin/login` |

Both use cookie authentication. Tenant scheme is HTMX-aware: returns `HX-Redirect` header instead of 302 for AJAX requests.

## Authorization Policies

| Policy | Requirement | Use |
|--------|------------|-----|
| `"SuperAdmin"` | Claim `is_super_admin = "true"` | Super admin routes |
| `"TenantUser"` | Claim `tenant_slug` exists | Any authenticated tenant user |
| `"TenantAdmin"` | Claim `tenant_slug` + role `"Admin"` | Tenant administration |

## Auth Claims

Stored in authentication cookie:

| Claim | Source |
|-------|--------|
| `NameIdentifier` | AppUser.Id |
| `Email` | AppUser.Email |
| `Name` | AppUser.DisplayName |
| `Role` | AppRole names (Admin, Member, etc.) |
| `tenant_slug` | Tenant slug from URL |
| `permission` | All user's permission slugs |
| `session_id` | UserSession.Id for session tracking |
| `is_super_admin` | "true" for super admins |

## ICurrentUser Interface

```csharp
public interface ICurrentUser
{
    string? UserId { get; }
    string? Email { get; }
    string? DisplayName { get; }
    bool IsAuthenticated { get; }
    bool IsSuperAdmin { get; }
    IReadOnlyList<string> Roles { get; }
    IReadOnlyList<string> Permissions { get; }
    bool HasPermission(string permission);
    bool HasAnyPermission(params string[] permissions);
}
```

Populated by `CurrentUserMiddleware` from `ClaimsPrincipal` on every request. Available via DI.

## Login Flow (Tenant)

```
1. GET  /{slug}/login           → Show login form
2. POST /{slug}/login           → Validate bot, send magic link email
3. User clicks email link
4. GET  /{slug}/verify?token=x  → Validate token, load user permissions
   ├── If 2FA enabled → redirect to /{slug}/two-factor-challenge
   │   ├── POST with TOTP code → validate → sign in
   │   └── POST with recovery code → validate → sign in
   └── If no 2FA → create session, sign in, redirect to dashboard
```

### Magic Link Details
- Generated by `MagicLinkService`
- Token: cryptographically random, stored hashed in `MagicLinkToken` entity
- Expiry: configurable (default ~15 minutes)
- Single-use: deleted after verification
- `MagicLinkCleanupService` — hosted service that periodically cleans expired tokens

### 2FA (TOTP)
- Standard TOTP (RFC 6238) via `TwoFactorService`
- Setup: generates shared secret, QR code, requires verification
- Recovery codes: generated on 2FA enable, one-time use
- Challenge protected by time-limited signed token (DataProtection)

## Login Flow (Super Admin)

```
1. GET  /super-admin/login       → Show login form
2. POST /super-admin/login       → Send magic link to super admin email
3. GET  /super-admin/verify      → Validate token
   ├── If 2FA enabled → challenge flow
   └── Else → sign in with SuperAdminAuth scheme
```

Super admin email seeded from `SuperAdmin:Email` config.

## Entities

### AppUser (extends IdentityUser)
Standard ASP.NET Identity user plus: `DisplayName`, `IsActive`, `LastLoginAt`, `LoginCount`, `EmailVerifiedAt`, `InvitedBy`. Implements `IAuditableEntity`.

### AppRole (extends IdentityRole)
Standard Identity role plus: `Description`, `IsSystemRole` (prevents deletion of Admin/Member).

### Permission
`Id`, `Slug` (e.g., `"notes.create"`), `Group` (e.g., `"Notes"`), `Description`.

### RolePermission
`RoleId` → `AppRole`, `PermissionId` → `Permission`. Many-to-many join.

### UserSession
`Id`, `UserId`, `LoginAt`, `LastActivityAt`, `IpAddress`, `UserAgent`, `IsActive`. Used for session management and concurrent session tracking.

### MagicLinkToken
`Id`, `UserId`, `TokenHash`, `ExpiresAt`, `IsUsed`, `CreatedAt`. Hashed for security.

## Controllers

### TenantAuthController (`/{slug}/...`)
Routes: `login` (GET/POST), `verify` (GET), `two-factor-challenge` (GET/POST), `logout` (GET/POST).
Rate-limited: login POST uses `"strict"` policy.

### SuperAdminAuthController (`/super-admin/...`)
Routes: `login` (GET/POST), `verify` (GET), `logout`.

### ProfileController (`/{slug}/profile/...`)
User profile management, display name, email change.

### SessionController (`/{slug}/sessions/...`)
View active sessions, revoke sessions.

### TwoFactorController (`/{slug}/two-factor/...`)
2FA setup: enable, verify, disable, regenerate recovery codes.

### SuperAdminTwoFactorController (`/super-admin/two-factor/...`)
Same as above for super admin scheme.

## Tag Helpers

### `<has-permission>`
```html
<has-permission name="notes.create">
    <button class="btn">Create Note</button>
</has-permission>
```
Renders children only if `ICurrentUser.HasPermission()` returns true.

### `<feature>`
```html
<feature name="notes">
    <div>Notes feature content</div>
</feature>
```
Renders children only if the feature is enabled for the current tenant.

## Attribute Filters

### `[HasPermission("slug")]`
Action filter — returns 403 if current user lacks the permission.

### `[RequireFeature("slug")]`
Action filter — returns 404 if the feature is not enabled for the tenant's plan.

## Registration in Module

```csharp
// AuthModule.RegisterServices:
services.AddIdentityCore<AppUser>()
    .AddRoles<AppRole>()
    .AddEntityFrameworkStores<TenantDbContext>()
    .AddSignInManager();

services.AddAuthentication()
    .AddCookie("SuperAdmin", ...)
    .AddCookie("Tenant", ...);

services.AddAuthorization(options => {
    options.AddPolicy("SuperAdmin", p => p.RequireClaim("is_super_admin", "true"));
    options.AddPolicy("TenantUser", p => p.RequireClaim("tenant_slug"));
    options.AddPolicy("TenantAdmin", p => p.RequireClaim("tenant_slug").RequireRole("Admin"));
});
```

## Key Integration Points

- `CurrentUserMiddleware` populates `ICurrentUser` after authentication
- `TenantResolutionMiddleware` sets `ITenantContext` before auth
- Feature flags checked via `IFeatureService` (from FeatureFlags module)
- Notifications sent on login via `INotificationService`
- `UserLoggedInEvent` published via MassTransit on successful login
- Session tracking via `UserSession` entities in tenant DB
